raw_text: Anthropic releases Claude 3.7 Sonnet with extended thinking and hybrid reasoning. Available via API at claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219. Supports 200k context window. Source: anthropic.com/news/claude-3-7-sonnet
Supabase adds branching support for database schemas. Branch your Postgres database like Git. GA release. See supabase.com/blog/database-branching
CVE-2024-21626: runc container escape vulnerability. All versions prior to v1.1.12 affected. CVSS 8.6. Update immediately. NVD reference: nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-21626
React 19 released with new hooks: useActionState, useFormStatus, useOptimistic. Server components stable. See react.dev/blog/2024/12/05/react-19
Completely unrelated sports news: local team wins championship game. No tech relevance.
